name: @vineland/attester
description: Chain-agnostic agent-integrity oracle. Signs a payment attestation ONLY when the requesting agent stays within its committed tool/recipient surface. The attestation the Soroban gate (autocharge_attested) and any chain's verifier consume — the question x402/Stripe don't ask: is the agent compromised?
author: Manuel Galmanus <manuel@bluewaveai.online>
